ddls:
CREATE TABLE "zip_codes" (
  "zip_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zip code */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the area */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the zip code */,
  "city" TEXT /* City name */,
  "state" TEXT /* State name */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the zip code */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the zip code */,
  "area_km" REAL /* Area in square kilometers */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zip_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "zip_code_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the zip code */,
  "white_percent" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is White */,
  "asian_percent" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is Asian */,
  "black_or_african_american_percent" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is Black or African American */,
  "american_indian_and_alaska_native_percent" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is American Indian and Alaska Native */,
  "hispanic_or_latino_percent" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is Hispanic or Latino */,
  "native_hawaiian_and_other_pacific_islander_percent" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is Native Hawaiian and Other Pacific Islander */,
  "female_percent" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is female */,
  "male_percent" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is male */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the zip code */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_zip_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("zip_code_id") REFERENCES zip_codes ("zip_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "economic_indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator record */,
  "zip_code_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the zip code */,
  "median_housing_costs" REAL /* Median monthly housing costs */,
  "median_income_all" REAL /* Median income for all individuals */,
  "median_income_full_time" REAL /* Median income for full-time workers */,
  "unemployment_rate_population_16_years_and_over" REAL /* Unemployment rate for the population 16 years and over */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate */,
  "gini_index" REAL /* Gini index */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("economic_indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_zip_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("zip_code_id") REFERENCES zip_codes ("zip_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educational_attainment" (
  "educational_attainment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each educational attainment record */,
  "zip_code_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the zip code */,
  "percent_high_school_graduate_or_higher" REAL /* Percentage of the population with a high school diploma or higher */,
  "percent_bachelors_degree_or_higher" REAL /* Percentage of the population with a bachelor's degree or higher */,
  "percent_masters_degree_or_higher" REAL /* Percentage of the population with a master's degree or higher */,
  "percent_doctoral_degree_or_higher" REAL /* Percentage of the population with a doctoral degree or higher */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("educational_attainment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_educational_attainment_zip_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("zip_code_id") REFERENCES zip_codes ("zip_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "housing_data" (
  "housing_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each housing data record */,
  "zip_code_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the zip code */,
  "owner_occupied_housing_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of owner-occupied housing units */,
  "renter_occupied_housing_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of renter-occupied housing units */,
  "median_home_value" REAL /* Median home value */,
  "average_rent" REAL /* Average rent */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("housing_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_data_zip_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("zip_code_id") REFERENCES zip_codes ("zip_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "sales_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales data record */,
  "zip_code_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the zip code */,
  "fy_2017_sales" INTEGER /* Sales data for fiscal year 2017 */,
  "fy_2018_sales" INTEGER /* Sales data for fiscal year 2018 */,
  "fy_2019_sales" INTEGER /* Sales data for fiscal year 2019 */,
  "fy_2020_sales" INTEGER /* Sales data for fiscal year 2020 */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_zip_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("zip_code_id") REFERENCES zip_codes ("zip_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., city planner, researcher, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "zip_code_id" INTEGER /* ID of the zip code being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_requested" TEXT /* Type of data requested (e.g., demographic, economic) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_zip_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("zip_code_id") REFERENCES zip_codes ("zip_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "zip_code_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the zip code */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., demographic, economic) */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_zip_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("zip_code_id") REFERENCES zip_codes ("zip_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "zip_code_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the zip code */,
  "visualization_name" TEXT /* Name of the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of the visualization (e.g., chart, map) */,
  "visualization_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the visualization */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the visualization was generated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_zip_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("zip_code_id") REFERENCES zip_codes ("zip_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "zip_code_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the zip code */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_zip_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("zip_code_id") REFERENCES zip_codes ("zip_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to the data source */,
  "source_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source link */,
  "zip_code_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the zip code */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_links_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_links_zip_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("zip_code_id") REFERENCES zip_codes ("zip_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
